svg.title: Netflix Azure DE pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Vertical data flow from GitHub through ADF, ADLS Gen2 medallion layers, Databricks, Delta Live Tables, to SQL Warehouse and Power BI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the GitHub source data in the Netflix pipeline')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the raw layer of the Netflix pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the bronze layer in the medallion architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does Auto Loader work in Databricks?')
sendPrompt('What transformations happen in the silver layer?')
sendPrompt('What is Delta Live Tables and how is it used in the gold layer?')
sendPrompt('What tables are in the gold layer?')
sendPrompt('What is a SQL Warehouse in Databricks?')
sendPrompt('How does Power BI connect to the Databricks gold layer?')
